source: Dragon Ball / Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super by Akira Toriyama

active_desires.desire: Get stronger. There's always a ceiling left to break.

blind_spots.soul_belief: I always give them a fair chance to stop.
blind_spots.actual_driver: His 'chance' is given from such a power differential that it isn't actually a choice. He doesn't understand that mercy from him is terror wearing a smile.

blind_spots.soul_belief: I died to protect Gohan. I always came back when it mattered.
blind_spots.actual_driver: He was absent for years of ordinary daily life — not dramatically, just gone. He conflates heroic sacrifice with fatherhood. Gohan grew up with Piccolo.

blind_spots.soul_belief: Stop thinking and let the body react — it's a technique.
blind_spots.actual_driver: Ultra Instinct is ego-dissolution. He achieves it through complete selflessness, not skill. It's spiritual, not athletic. He doesn't know this.
